suggestions.title: Integrate Modern Dependency Lock Files
suggestions.description: The project uses basic package manifests without locking dependencies (e.g. poetry.lock, package-lock.json).
suggestions.benefit: Ensures deterministic environment installations across all production and developer machines.

suggestions.title: Modernize Command-Line Parsing with Typer
suggestions.description: The codebase is identified as a CLI Utility. Migrating to Typer leverages Python type hints for auto-completions, nested commands, and clean interface structures.
suggestions.benefit: Reduces boilerplate parsing logic and provides self-documenting cli help menus.

explanation: Generated 2 evolution suggestions for the project. Included recommendations for package lock integrations, code quality linting, and framework-specific upgrades.
